sections.paragraph:
f. (from the root הָלַל Piel).-

(1) praise, Psa 22:26 48:11 51:17 hence-(a) a song containing praise, a hymn, Psa 22:4 66:2 145:1 and pl. תְּהִלִּים, as the title of the whole book of Psalms.-(b) the person praised or celebrated, Deu 26:19 Jer 13:11 33:9 Zep 3:19, 20 Zep 3:20.

(2) praise, in which any one stands with respect to others, glory, Psa 9:15 Isa 42:8. Hence the person (or thing) wherein any one glories. Jer 17:14, אַתָּה תְהִלָּתִי “thou (Jehovah, art) my glory.” Deu 10:21.
